columns.description: Account manager's full name (FirstName + LastName). Resolved from Dim_Manager via AccountManagerID. 'System' = no assigned manager. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Manager)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

Marketing acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID. Values: Direct, Affiliate, SEM, SEO, Mobile Acquisition, Media Performance, Friend Referral, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Sub-channel within the acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel. Values: Direct Mobile, Affiliate, Direct, SEO, Mobile CPA, Google UAC, Google Brand, FB, YT, ASA, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Customer's eToro Club tier level. Resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Updated daily. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_PlayerLevel)
Customer ID — primary identifier for a customer in the eToro platform. Maps to Dim_Customer.RealCID. Distribution key; always filter/join on CID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

Marketing acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID. Values: Direct, Affiliate, SEM, SEO, Mobile Acquisition, Media Performance, Friend Referral, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Sub-channel within the acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel. Values: Direct Mobile, Affiliate, Direct, SEO, Mobile CPA, Google UAC, Google Brand, FB, YT, ASA, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)
Most recent position open date (manual or copy). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,2) (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
Most recent real-money login timestamp. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=14 (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

Updated marketing region classification. From Dim_Country.MarketingRegionManualName. Values: SEA, UK, French, Latam, German, CEE, Arabic, USA, Italian, ROW, Nordics, Spain, Australia. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Country ID — FK to Dim_Country.CountryID. Use Dim_Country for country name, region, regulation mapping, and risk group. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's eToro username (display name on the platform). PII. From Dim_Customer.UserName. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer's platform language preference. Resolved from Dim_Language.Name via LanguageID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Language)

First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)

Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer's state/province. Resolved from Dim_State_and_Province.Name via RegionByIP_ID. Populated for US, Italy, and select countries. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_State_and_Province)
Customer ID — primary identifier for a customer in the eToro platform. Maps to Dim_Customer.RealCID. Distribution key; always filter/join on CID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Country ID — FK to Dim_Country.CountryID. Use Dim_Country for country name, region, regulation mapping, and risk group. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Amount of the first successful deposit in USD. Default 0. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositAmount. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer ID — primary identifier for a customer in the eToro platform. Maps to Dim_Customer.RealCID. Distribution key; always filter/join on CID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)
Amount of the first successful deposit in USD. Default 0. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositAmount. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

Marketing acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID. Values: Direct, Affiliate, SEM, SEO, Mobile Acquisition, Media Performance, Friend Referral, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Sub-channel within the acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel. Values: Direct Mobile, Affiliate, Direct, SEO, Mobile CPA, Google UAC, Google Brand, FB, YT, ASA, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Updated marketing region classification. From Dim_Country.MarketingRegionManualName. Values: SEA, UK, French, Latam, German, CEE, Arabic, USA, Italian, ROW, Nordics, Spain, Australia. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Registration funnel name. Resolved from Dim_Funnel.Name via FunnelID. Values: Retoro, reToroiOS, reToroAndroid, Web Trader, etc. Indicates which app/platform was used for registration. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Funnel)
Country ID — FK to Dim_Country.CountryID. Use Dim_Country for country name, region, regulation mapping, and risk group. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

Regulatory entity ID. FK to Dim_Regulation.ID. Values: 0=None, 1=CySEC, 2=FCA, 3=NFA, 4=ASIC, 5=BVI (~80%), 6=eToroUS, 7=FinCEN, 8=FinCEN+FINRA, 9=FSA Seychelles, 10=ASIC&GAML, 11=FSRA, 12=FINRAONLY, 13=MAS, 14=NYDFS+FINRA. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Regulation)

Customer's eToro Club tier level. Resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Updated daily. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_PlayerLevel)
Customer gender. M=Male, F=Female, U=Unknown, NULL=not provided. From Dim_Customer.Gender. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Amount of the first successful deposit in USD. Default 0. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositAmount. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer ID — primary identifier for a customer in the eToro platform. Maps to Dim_Customer.RealCID. Distribution key; always filter/join on CID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Marketing acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID. Values: Direct, Affiliate, SEM, SEO, Mobile Acquisition, Media Performance, Friend Referral, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Sub-channel within the acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel. Values: Direct Mobile, Affiliate, Direct, SEO, Mobile CPA, Google UAC, Google Brand, FB, YT, ASA, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)
Sub-affiliate tracking ID. From Dim_Customer.SubSerialID. Can contain URLs, campaign tags, or partner codes. Free-text. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's state/province. Resolved from Dim_State_and_Province.Name via RegionByIP_ID. Populated for US, Italy, and select countries. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_State_and_Province)

Electronic verification match status. FK to Dim_EvMatchStatus.EvMatchStatusID. Values: 0=None, 1=PartiallyVerified, 2=Verified, 3=NotVerified. From Dim_Customer.EvMatchStatus. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_EvMatchStatus)
Customer ID — primary identifier for a customer in the eToro platform. Maps to Dim_Customer.RealCID. Distribution key; always filter/join on CID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

Marketing acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID. Values: Direct, Affiliate, SEM, SEO, Mobile Acquisition, Media Performance, Friend Referral, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Sub-channel within the acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel. Values: Direct Mobile, Affiliate, Direct, SEO, Mobile CPA, Google UAC, Google Brand, FB, YT, ASA, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)
Current realized equity (USD). From V_Liabilities. Updated only when @date = yesterday. Represents deposits + realized P&L - withdrawals. (Tier 2 — SP code, V_Liabilities)
Current credit balance (USD). From V_Liabilities. Updated only when @date = yesterday. Represents available trading credit including bonuses. (Tier 2 — SP code, V_Liabilities)
Most recent position open date (manual or copy). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,2) (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
Most recent real-money login timestamp. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=14 (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

Updated marketing region classification. From Dim_Country.MarketingRegionManualName. Values: SEA, UK, French, Latam, German, CEE, Arabic, USA, Italian, ROW, Nordics, Spain, Australia. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
First date the customer became "funded." From Function_Population_First_Time_Funded. Set once, never overwritten. (Tier 2 — SP code, Function_Population_First_Time_Funded)
Country ID — FK to Dim_Country.CountryID. Use Dim_Country for country name, region, regulation mapping, and risk group. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

Marketing acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID. Values: Direct, Affiliate, SEM, SEO, Mobile Acquisition, Media Performance, Friend Referral, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Sub-channel within the acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel. Values: Direct Mobile, Affiliate, Direct, SEO, Mobile CPA, Google UAC, Google Brand, FB, YT, ASA, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Updated marketing region classification. From Dim_Country.MarketingRegionManualName. Values: SEA, UK, French, Latam, German, CEE, Arabic, USA, Italian, ROW, Nordics, Spain, Australia. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's email address. PII — use masked UC table for non-privileged access. From Dim_Customer.Email. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer's date of birth. PII. 1900-01-02 = unknown/not provided. From Dim_Customer.BirthDate. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's IP address (as numeric). PII. From Dim_Customer.IP. Mostly NULL in recent records. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Date customer first reached Verification Level 3 (fully verified). From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=3). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Date customer first reached Verification Level 2. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=2). Backfilled from Level 3 if NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Date customer first reached Verification Level 1. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=1). May be backfilled from higher levels. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Date customer reached EvMatchStatus=2 (Verified) for electronic verification. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Customer's eToro Club tier level. Resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Updated daily. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_PlayerLevel)
Country ID — FK to Dim_Country.CountryID. Use Dim_Country for country name, region, regulation mapping, and risk group. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)

Customer's eToro Club tier level. Resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Updated daily. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_PlayerLevel)
Customer ID — primary identifier for a customer in the eToro platform. Maps to Dim_Customer.RealCID. Distribution key; always filter/join on CID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Updated marketing region classification. From Dim_Country.MarketingRegionManualName. Values: SEA, UK, French, Latam, German, CEE, Arabic, USA, Italian, ROW, Nordics, Spain, Australia. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)
Customer ID — primary identifier for a customer in the eToro platform. Maps to Dim_Customer.RealCID. Distribution key; always filter/join on CID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Customer's eToro Club tier level. Resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Updated daily. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_PlayerLevel)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)
Date customer first reached Verification Level 3 (fully verified). From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=3). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Customer's eToro username (display name on the platform). PII. From Dim_Customer.UserName. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer ID — primary identifier for a customer in the eToro platform. Maps to Dim_Customer.RealCID. Distribution key; always filter/join on CID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Global Customer ID — globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Original CID before account merge or migration. From Dim_Customer.OriginalCID. Useful for tracking merged accounts. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer's eToro username (display name on the platform). PII. From Dim_Customer.UserName. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Customer's eToro Club tier level. Resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Updated daily. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_PlayerLevel)
Affiliate serial ID. From Dim_Customer.AffiliateID. Identifies the affiliate partner who referred this customer. 0 = no affiliate. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

Marketing acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel via Dim_Affiliate.SubChannelID. Values: Direct, Affiliate, SEM, SEO, Mobile Acquisition, Media Performance, Friend Referral, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Sub-channel within the acquisition channel. Resolved from Dim_Channel. Values: Direct Mobile, Affiliate, Direct, SEO, Mobile CPA, Google UAC, Google Brand, FB, YT, ASA, etc. Default 'Direct' when NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Channel)

Platform brand/label the customer registered under. Resolved from Dim_Label.Name via LabelID. Values: eToro (~97%), eToroRussia, ICMarkets, eToroChina, Royal-CM, eToroUSA, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Label)
Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's platform language preference. Resolved from Dim_Language.Name via LanguageID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Language)
Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Sales desk assignment. Resolved from Dim_Country.Desk. Indicates which sales/support desk handles this customer's region. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Customer's email address. PII — use masked UC table for non-privileged access. From Dim_Customer.Email. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Current credit balance (USD). From V_Liabilities. Updated only when @date = yesterday. Represents available trading credit including bonuses. (Tier 2 — SP code, V_Liabilities)
Current realized equity (USD). From V_Liabilities. Updated only when @date = yesterday. Represents deposits + realized P&L - withdrawals. (Tier 2 — SP code, V_Liabilities)
DEPRECATED — Whether customer connected a social account. 1 = connected, NULL = not. Source table not updated since Sep 2018. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)

Customer verification level ID. Resolved via Dim_VerificationLevel. Values: 0=Unverified, 1=Level 1, 2=Level 2, 3=Fully Verified. NOT a boolean — do not treat as 0/1. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_VerificationLevel)
DEPRECATED — KYC status. Nullified 2022-02-22. All values are NULL. Do not use. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
Whether customer's documents have been approved. 1 = approved, NULL = not yet approved. Mostly NULL (~99.9%). (Tier 3 — live data)

Whether customer account is blocked/restricted. 0 = active, 1 = blocked. Computed from PlayerStatusID IN (2,4,6,7,8,9). Blocked != closed — check Dim_Customer.PendingClosureStatusID for closure. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_PlayerStatus)
Whether customer is flagged as a sales account. 0 = not sales, 1 = sales. Mostly NULL (~94%). (Tier 3 — live data)
Whether customer has a profile picture. 1 = has picture, 0 = no picture. Mostly NULL (~98.6%). (Tier 3 — live data)
DEPRECATED — Bankruptcy flag. Nullified 2022-02-22. All values are NULL. Do not use. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)

Registration funnel name. Resolved from Dim_Funnel.Name via FunnelID. Values: Retoro, reToroiOS, reToroAndroid, Web Trader, etc. Indicates which app/platform was used for registration. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Funnel)
Download tracking ID from customer acquisition. From Dim_Customer.DownloadID. Typically 0. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer registration date — the earlier of RegisteredDemo and RegisteredReal from Dim_Customer. First-ever interaction with the platform. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
[UNVERIFIED] First time the user engaged with the platform as a new user. Rarely populated — not updated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
First real-money login timestamp. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=14. Set once, never overwritten (MIN logic). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
[UNVERIFIED] First demo account login timestamp. Not updated by current SP code. May contain historical values only. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] First demo position open date. Not updated by current SP code. May contain historical values only. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] First demo copy-trade registration date. Not updated by current SP code. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] Last demo copy-trade registration date. Not updated by current SP code. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] First demo copy-trade position open date. Not updated by current SP code. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
First cashier page login. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=29 (MIN). First time customer visited the deposit/cashier page. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
First deposit attempt timestamp (regardless of success). From Fact_FirstCustomerAction where ActionTypeID=27. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_FirstCustomerAction)
Amount of the first deposit attempt in USD. Computed as Amount * ExchangeRate. (Tier 2 — SP code)
Payment processor for the first deposit attempt. Currently set to 'NA' (not available from current data source). (Tier 2 — SP code)
Funding type for the first deposit attempt. Currently set to 'NA' (not available from current data source). (Tier 2 — SP code)

First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)
Payment processor for the first deposit. Resolved from Dim_BillingDepot.Name via DepotID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_BillingDepot)
Funding type for the first deposit. Resolved from Dim_FundingType.Name via FundingTypeID. Values: CreditCard, Wire, PayPal, eToroMoney, IXOPAY-Nuvei, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_FundingType)
Amount of the first successful deposit in USD. Default 0. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositAmount. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
DEPRECATED — First social engagement date. ETL section commented out. May contain historical values. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
First position open date (manual or copy-trade). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,2). Uses MIN logic. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
First copy-trade (mirror) registration date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=17. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
Most recent copy-trade registration date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=17 (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
First copy-trade position open date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=2. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
DEPRECATED — First lead date. Nullified 2022-02-22. 1900-01-01 = sentinel for older records. Do not use. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
[UNVERIFIED] Extended first deposit amount — may include bonuses or promotions. Not updated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
CID of the customer who referred this customer. 0 = no referral. From Dim_Customer.ReferralID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
[UNVERIFIED] Last demo login date. Not updated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] Last demo copy-trade position date. Not updated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] Last demo position open date. Not updated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
DEPRECATED — Last social engagement date. ETL section commented out. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
Most recent real-money login timestamp. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=14 (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
Most recent copy-trade position open date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=2 (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
Most recent position open date (manual or copy). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,2) (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
Whether the customer is a certified Popular Investor (guru). 1 = certified, NULL = not certified. Very rare (~515 out of 45M). (Tier 3 — live data)
First time another customer copied this customer's trades. From Dim_Mirror.OpenOccurred (MIN for this CID as ParentCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Mirror)
Most recent time another customer copied this customer's trades. From Dim_Mirror.OpenOccurred (MAX for this CID as ParentCID). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Mirror)
Customer gender. M=Male, F=Female, U=Unknown, NULL=not provided. From Dim_Customer.Gender. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Country ID — FK to Dim_Country.CountryID. Use Dim_Country for country name, region, regulation mapping, and risk group. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
First manually opened position date (NOT copy-trade). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=1. Note: "Menual" is a typo for "Manual." (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
Customer's date of birth. PII. 1900-01-02 = unknown/not provided. From Dim_Customer.BirthDate. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer's preferred communication language (emails, notifications). Resolved from Dim_Language.Name via CommunicationLanguageID. May differ from platform Language. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Language)
Most recent manually opened position date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=1 (MAX). Note: "Menual" is a typo for "Manual." (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
DEPRECATED — First social account connection date. Source not updated since 2018. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
Most recent cashier page login. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=29 (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
First withdrawal/cashout date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=8 (MIN). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

Name of the originating marketing funnel. Resolved from Dim_Funnel.Name via FunnelFromID. Shows specific landing page/campaign funnel (eToro Homepage, Stocks Offering, reToroiOS, etc.). (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Funnel)
Affiliate banner ID. From Dim_Customer.BannerID. 0 = no banner/direct. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Sub-affiliate tracking ID. From Dim_Customer.SubSerialID. Can contain URLs, campaign tags, or partner codes. Free-text. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
ID of the first marketing campaign the customer received. From History.Credit.CampaignID (via External_etoro_History_Credit). (Tier 2 — SP code, History.Credit)
Date of the first marketing campaign received. (Tier 2 — SP code, History.Credit)
Amount of the first campaign payment/credit received (USD). (Tier 2 — SP code, History.Credit)
First date the customer opened a real stocks position. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=34. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
[UNVERIFIED] Whether customer was retained at day 7 after first deposit. 1 = retained, 0 = not retained, NULL = not yet evaluated. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] Whether customer was retained between first deposit and day 7. 1 = retained, 0 = not retained, NULL = not yet evaluated. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] Whether customer was retained on first-date basis. 1 = retained, 0 = not retained, NULL = not yet evaluated. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
Most recent phone contact attempt date. From BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF — Salesforce usage tracking. (Tier 2 — SP code, BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF)
Most recent successful contact date (any channel). From BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF where ActionName IN ('Completed_Contact_Email__c', 'Phone_Call_Succeed__c'). (Tier 2 — SP code, BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF)
Most recent contact attempt date (any channel). From BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF. (Tier 2 — SP code, BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF)
Most recent successful phone contact date. From BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF where ActionName = 'Phone_Call_Succeed__c'. (Tier 2 — SP code, BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF)
First contact attempt date (any channel). From BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF (MIN). (Tier 2 — SP code, BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF)
[UNVERIFIED] First phone contact attempt date. Not explicitly set in current SP code. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
First successful contact date (any channel). From BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF (MIN). (Tier 2 — SP code, BI_DB_UsageTracking_SF)
[UNVERIFIED] First successful phone contact date. Not explicitly set in current SP code. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] Whether customer has a premium account type. Entirely NULL in current data — not populated. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
Whether customer is an eToro evangelist/ambassador. 1 = evangelist, NULL = not. Very rare (~208). (Tier 3 — live data)
[UNVERIFIED] Whether customer was retained between first deposit and day 30. 1 = retained, 0 = not retained, NULL = not yet evaluated. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
DEPRECATED — First social wall engagement date. ETL section commented out. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
[UNVERIFIED] Whether the customer's social feed is unblocked. Entirely NULL — not populated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
Privacy policy version accepted by the customer. Values: 1 (~47%), 2 (~53%). From Dim_Customer.PrivacyPolicyID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Customer's IP address (as numeric). PII. From Dim_Customer.IP. Mostly NULL in recent records. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Whether the customer has unlocked their social feed. 0 = locked, 1 = unlocked, NULL = not evaluated. (Tier 3 — live data)
[UNVERIFIED] Date when the customer followed 5 users (social onboarding milestone). Not populated in current data. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] Number of users this customer is following on the social feed. Not populated in current data. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
Whether customer is part of the Popular Investor program. 1 = yes, NULL = no. Very rare (~360). (Tier 3 — live data)
Account manager's full name (FirstName + LastName). Resolved from Dim_Manager via AccountManagerID. 'System' = no assigned manager. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Manager)
DEPRECATED — Suitability test completion date. Nullified 2022-02-22. 1900-01-01 = sentinel in older records. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
DEPRECATED — Whether customer passed the suitability test. Nullified 2022-02-22. All NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
[UNVERIFIED] ML model score predicting FTD (First Time Deposit) / OTD conversion probability. Not populated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
[UNVERIFIED] ML model score for lead quality/conversion. Not populated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)
Most recent deposit date. From Fact_BillingDeposit via #fundingLast (ModificationDate). Updated daily for new deposits. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)
Amount of the most recent deposit in USD. From Fact_BillingDeposit (Amount * ExchangeRate). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)
Funding type of the most recent deposit. Resolved from Dim_FundingType.Name. Values: CreditCard, Wire, PayPal, eToroMoney, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_FundingType)
[UNVERIFIED] ML model score predicting re-deposit probability. Not populated by current SP. (Tier 4 — column name inference)

Regulatory entity ID. FK to Dim_Regulation.ID. Values: 0=None, 1=CySEC, 2=FCA, 3=NFA, 4=ASIC, 5=BVI (~80%), 6=eToroUS, 7=FinCEN, 8=FinCEN+FINRA, 9=FSA Seychelles, 10=ASIC&GAML, 11=FSRA, 12=FINRAONLY, 13=MAS, 14=NYDFS+FINRA. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Regulation)
DEPRECATED — Customer risk classification. A/B/C. ETL disabled 2023-05-09. Historical values only. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
DEPRECATED — Customer deposit tier. Low/Mid/High. ETL disabled 2023-05-09. Historical values only. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
Date customer first reached Verification Level 1. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=1). May be backfilled from higher levels. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Date customer first reached Verification Level 2. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=2). Backfilled from Level 3 if NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Date customer first reached Verification Level 3 (fully verified). From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=3). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Date customer's email was verified. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where IsEmailVerified=1). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
First mobile app install date. From BI_DB_AppFlyer_Reports (EventName='install') via AppsFlyer tracking. (Tier 2 — SP code, BI_DB_AppFlyer_Reports)
Date customer reached EvMatchStatus=2 (Verified) for electronic verification. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)
Customer's state/province. Resolved from Dim_State_and_Province.Name via RegionByIP_ID. Populated for US, Italy, and select countries. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_State_and_Province)
Date customer's phone was verified. From History.BackOfficeCustomer where PhoneVerifiedID IN (1=AutomaticallyVerified, 2=ManuallyVerified). (Tier 2 — SP code, History.BackOfficeCustomer)
KYC verification mode. Values: 1 (~48%), 2 (~9%), 3 (~0.3%), 4 (~6%), NULL (~37%). From ComplianceStateDB.Compliance.CustomerKycMode. Joined on GCID. (Tier 2 — SP code, ComplianceStateDB)
DEPRECATED — PEP (Politically Exposed Person) check creation time. Nullified 2022-02-22. 1900-01-01 = sentinel. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
DEPRECATED — PEP status last update date. Nullified 2022-02-22. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
DEPRECATED — Whether customer passed PEP screening. Nullified 2022-02-22. All NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)
DEPRECATED — PEP screening status ID. Nullified 2022-02-22. All NULL. (Tier 2 — SP code, deprecated)

Electronic verification match status. FK to Dim_EvMatchStatus.EvMatchStatusID. Values: 0=None, 1=PartiallyVerified, 2=Verified, 3=NotVerified. From Dim_Customer.EvMatchStatus. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_EvMatchStatus)

Whether first deposit occurred within 7 days of registration AND deposit > 0. 1 = fast depositor, 0 = slower or no deposit. Computed: DATEDIFF(DAY, registered, FirstDepositDate) < 8 AND FirstDepositAmount > 0. (Tier 2 — SP code)

Designated regulation entity ID. FK to Dim_Regulation.ID. Same value map as RegulationID. May differ when designated regulation differs from operating regulation. From Dim_Customer.DesignatedRegulationID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)
Date the customer applied for professional (non-retail) classification. From ComplianceStateDB.Compliance.CustomerProfessionalQuestionnaireResult. (Tier 2 — SP code, ComplianceStateDB)
Date of the most recent marketing campaign sent to this customer. (Tier 2 — SP code)

Updated marketing region classification. From Dim_Country.MarketingRegionManualName. Values: SEA, UK, French, Latam, German, CEE, Arabic, USA, Italian, ROW, Nordics, Spain, Australia. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)
Whether customer is currently "funded" — meeting active depositor criteria. 1 = funded, 0 = not funded. Determined by Function_Population_Funded. (Tier 2 — SP code, Function_Population_Funded)
First date the customer became "funded." From Function_Population_First_Time_Funded. Set once, never overwritten. (Tier 2 — SP code, Function_Population_First_Time_Funded)
Most recent date the customer was in "funded" status. From DDR daily status and Function_Population_Funded. Updated daily. (Tier 2 — SP code)

Whether customer received a crypto airdrop in the last 30 days AND has deposited. 1 = received airdrop. From Fact_CustomerAction (ActionTypeID=1, IsAirDrop=1, InstrumentTypeID=5). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
[UNVERIFIED] Date the customer signed the W-8BEN tax form (for non-US customers trading US securities). Not populated by current SP (section disabled). (Tier 4 — column name inference)
Most recent withdrawal/cashout date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=8 (MAX). (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
Most recent date the customer published a post on the social feed. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=21. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

Most recent "life stage" action date (manual pos open, mirror pos open, mirror registration, or cashout). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,15,17). Used for lifecycle stage classification. (Tier 2 — SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)
